name: White Gold Corp.
summary: White Gold Corp. operates as a gold exploration company in Canada. It owns a claim portfolio of approximately 420,000 hectares, including its flagship project Golden Saddle and Arc deposits located in the White Gold property in Dawson City, Yukon. The company is partnered with Agnico Eagle Mines Limited and Kinross Gold Corporation. The company was formerly known as G4G Capital Corp. and changed its name to White Gold Corp. in December 2016. White Gold Corp. was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
